description.en: Creates a recurring billing plan. Individual subscriptions reference this plan. The response includes `init_point` to send subscribers to authorize billing.
Update subscription status or billing details. Common use: `{"status": "paused"}` to pause, `{"status": "authorized"}` to resume, `{"status": "cancelled"}` to cancel.
Exports a list of subscriptions for a collector as a downloadable file. Filter by plan ID, status, and sort order.
ISO 4217 currency code for the applicable site
Pagination metadata returned in list/search responses
Request body to create a subscription plan (preapproval_plan). A plan defines the recurring billing terms. Individual subscriptions (preapproval) are then created referencing this plan.
Plan description shown to the payer
Billing interval (e.g., 1 for monthly, 7 for weekly)
Amount to charge each cycle (decimal, not cents)
Optional free trial period before billing starts
Total number of billing cycles (null = indefinite)
URL to subscribe users to this plan
Request body to create a subscription (preapproval). Either reference a preapproval_plan or define auto_recurring inline.
Card token for credit card subscriptions
Initial status (default is pending until payer authorizes)
Authorization URL — send payer here to confirm subscription
Request body to update a subscription.
New card token to update the payment method.
Token for secondary/fallback payment method card.
Secondary payment method identifier for fallback charges.
